title: Ace Burns Open an Escape
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on ace burns open an escape, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Ace Burns Open an Escape. Ace steps between Luffy and the Marines, showing his strength while Vivi pushes the mission toward stopping Crocodile. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Just what's going on over there?

dialogue.speaker: Marine
dialogue.text: All the marines suddenly left their boats...

dialogue.speaker: Marine
dialogue.text: Did some trouble break out in the city?

dialogue.speaker: Marine
dialogue.text: Well... Doesn't bother me, heh heh,

dialogue.speaker: Marine
dialogue.text: Now's the perfect chance to escape...!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You know my codemme?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then you must be the Millions, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well don't just stand there! Hurry up and untie these ropes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're still members of BW, but we ain't Millions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're billions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In other words, we're next-in-line for future numbered agents.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Mr. 11... A bottom-ranked numbered agent like you isn't exactly in a position to order us around.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: O-oh, sorry about that, Billions.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In any case, would you mind untying these ropes for me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'd rather have you leave an available position for a numbered agent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What!? No, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Get back on the ship? Are we leaving this island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, we'll take the ship to travel along the river so we can dock further inland. From there, the desert we need to cross is right ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The only reason why we stopped by in Nanchana was to buy some supplies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hurry up! The marines are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Raise the anchor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Never thought I'd meet Ace in a place like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Since we can't talk like this just run along ahead, I'll catch up with you later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll stop these guys in the meanwhile.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NOW GO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!? Who's he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy! Hurry up and get onboard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Carue, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's a task that I can ask only you to do.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Quack?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Head north to Alabasta and deliver this letter to my father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This has all the information about Baroque Works and Crocodile,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That Igaram and I dug up,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: While we were undercover,

summary: This part highlights ace burns open an escape and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
